current_html:
§ 182.20 What must a Federal agency do to implement the guidance?

To comply with the requirement in 41 U.S.C. 8106 for government-wide regulations, each Federal agency that awards grants or cooperative agreements or makes other financial assistance awards that are subject to the drug-free workplace requirements in subparts A through F of the guidance must issue a regulation consistent with those subparts.
proposed_html:
§ 182.20
What must a Federal agency do to implement this part?

To comply with the requirement in 41 U.S.C. 8106 for Government-wide regulations, each Federal agency that awards grants or cooperative agreements or makes other financial assistance awards that are subject to the drug-free workplace requirements in subparts A through F of this part must issue a regulation consistent with those subparts.
